words.zh: 认识/识别出；承人/认可/接受

beyond recognition 难以/无法识别

examples: be distinguished from 与...区分开

与某事绑定/联系在一块儿

多元的；不同/各色各样的

examples: define A as B 把A定义为B

spread fast across the world 火速传遍全球
in a wide range of areas 在广泛的领域中
maintain social distance 保持社交距离

phrases.en: Parents can easily become over-protective of their children
phrases.zh: 父母容易过度保护孩子

words.zh: 恶劣/艰苦的；严酷/厉/苛的

examples: combat child labor 打击(使用)童工现象

words.zh: 不破坏生态平衡的；可持续的

phrases.en: arouse feelings of guilt in sb.

examples: wipe sth. off 擦掉；抹去

phrases.en: The ball is in your court
phrases.zh: 轮到你做决定了；该你行动了

words.zh: 无污染/无公害的；洁净的

examples: as the proverb goes 俗话说

不理睬；终止与某人的关系

phrases.en: the commitment of time and thought to doing sth.

examples: snap back at sb. 反唇相讥

strike while the iron is hot 趁热打铁

偿清债务；某行为带来回报
我吃过苦头/知道那行不通

words.zh: 使人愉快的；娱乐性/有趣的

examples: portray sb. as 描绘某人为

对某人宽容或减少/缓和某事

examples: A man can be destroyed but not defeated
Time heals all wounds 时间能抚平一切创伤

phrases.en: hear the noise of skin and flesh ripping
phrases.zh: 听到皮肤和肉撕裂的声音

examples: a hybrid car 混合动力汽车
端午节是为了纪念爱国诗人屈原

drive the spear into the shark

examples: despite the setback 尽管遇到挫折
be curious about 对...感到好奇

cannot afford to do sth. 承担不起

A is superior to B in sth.
